---
title: "Spatio-temporal models with `inlabru`"
author: "Jafet Belmont, Sara Martino and Janine Illian"
subtitle: "Pamplona (Spain) October 2026"
format: 
  html:
    mainfont: "12"
  PrettyPDF-pdf:
    keep-tex:  true
    number-sections: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---



# Welcome to the course!

-   Welcome to the `inlabru` workshop in Pamplona!
-   The aim of this workshop is to introduce you to a range of statistical modelling approaches, in particular the temporal, spatial and spatio-temporal modelling as implemented in the `inlabru` package.
-   Workshop materials are available in the github repository

::: {.callout-warning}
##  Important! ⚠️

 Please use the instructions provided [here](Install_software.qmd) to install and check your installation
  *before* the course start.
:::

# Learning Objectives for the workshop

At the end of the workshop, participants will have an understanding of:

-   the motivation for and the challenges of analysing and modelling spatial data
-   statistical models used to analyse spatial and spatio-temporal data
-   the implementation of these models in the `inlabru` package
-   how to independently analyse spatial data with `inlabru`

# Intended audience

The workshop aims to cater for participants with a range of different backgrounds, who is interested in analysing data with modern spatial and spatio-temporal statistical modelling approaches.

# Prerequisites

Participants should be familiar with the `R` environment, and general statistical approaches for modelling such as regression, analysis of (co)variance, and generalized linear models.​

No knowledge of `R-INLA` or `inlabru` is required.

# Schedule {#schedule-tabs}

**NOTE** THIS HAS TO BE UPDATED!!!!


::: panel-tabset
### Day 1

: {.striped .hover}


| Time | Topic |
|:----------------------------------:|:----------------------------------:|
| 10:00 - 10:30 | [**Welcome  and intro to the course**](Slides_Janine_pdf/intro_slides_inlabru_course.pdf) |
| 10:30 - 11:30 | [**Session 1**: Introduction to `inlabru`](slides/slides_1.html) |
| 11:30 - 13:00 | [**Session 2**: Some practical tips on `inlabru`](slides/slides_2.html) |
| 13:00 - 14:30 | Lunch break 🍽️ |
| 14:00 - 15:00 | [Practical Session 1](practicals/LMM_ex.qmd) |
|               |[Practical Session 2](practicals/GLMM_fit.qmd) |
| 15:00 - 16:00 | [**Session 3**: Time Series Models](slides/slides_3.html)|


### Day 2

: {.striped .hover}



| Time | Topic |
|:----------------------------------:|:----------------------------------:|
| 8:00 - 9:00 | [**Session 3 cont.**: Time Series Models](slides/slides_3.html) |
| 9:00 - 11:00 | [Practical Session 3](day2_practical_3.html) |
| 11:00 - 12:00 | [**Session 4**: Introduction to Spatial Statistics](Slides_Janine_pdf/slides_session_4_inlabru.pdf) |
| 12:00 - 13:00 | Lunch |
|13:00 - 14:00 | [**Session 5**: Areal processes](Slides_Janine_pdf/slides_5_inlabru.pdf) |
|14.00 - 15:00 |  [**Session 6**: Geostatistics](Slides_Janine_pdf/slides_6_inlabru.pdf) |


### Day 3

: {.striped .hover}


| Time | Topic |
|:----------------------------------:|:----------------------------------:|
| 8:00 - 09:00 | [**Session 7**: Point Processes](Slides_Janine_pdf/slides_7_inlabru.pdf) |
| 09:00 - 11:00 |  [Practical Session 4](day2_practical_4.html) |
|               |  [Practical Session 5](day3_practical_5.html) |
| 11:00 - 12:00 |  [**Session 8**: Spatiotemporal models](slides/slides_spatioTemporal.qmd)  |
| 12:00 - 13:00 | Lunch break 🍽️ |
| 13:00 - 14:00 | [**Session 9**: Model comparison and evaluation](slides/slides_Model_Comparison.qmd) |
| 14:00 - 15:00 | [Practical Session 6](day4_practical_6.qmd) |



### Day 4

: {.striped .hover}


| Time | Topic |
|:----------------------------------:|:----------------------------------:|
| 8:00 - 9:00 | [**Session 10**: Multi-likelihood/joint likelihood models](Slides_Janine_pdf/slides_10_inlabru.pdf)  |
| 9:00 - 10:00  |[Practical Session 7](day4_practical_7.qmd) |
|10:00 - 11:00 | [**Session 11**: Zero Inflated Models](slides/slides_Zero_Inflated.qmd) 
| 12:00 - 13:00 | Lunch ☕ |
| 13:00 - 14:00 | [Practical Session 7](day4_practical_7.qmd) |
| 14:00 - 15:00 | [Closing session](slides/slides_Closing_Remarks.qmd) and discussion|


:::


# Licence
[CC-BY-4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)


# Citation
